scripts.start: concurrently "cd backend && npm run start" "cd frontend/client && npm run start" "cd frontend/admin && npm run start"
scripts.init-all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend/client && npm build && npm install && cd ../admin && npm build && npm install
scripts.init-APK: cd frontend/client && npm install @capacitor/core @capacitor/cli && npx cap init "Printer Ink" "com.myproject.app" --web-dir=out && npm install @capacitor/android && npx cap add android
scripts.updateAPK: cd frontend/client && npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.createAPK: cd frontend/client && npx cap open android
